title: Read-only mode - "you can only view this board"
excerpt: I can’t seem to edit anything on my boards. The site is telling me that I am in read-only mode and “you can only view this board.” I seem to be able to make edits in the phone app, however. Why would it be different in a…

posts.author: morganpgs (Morgan Westwood)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t seem to edit anything on my boards. The site is telling me that I am in read-only mode and “you can only view this board.” I seem to be able to make edits in the phone app, however. Why would it be different in a browser than on a phone? I should be able to edit boards in both places. Thank you.
